series_metadata.series_description: This series includes mosquito and tick surveillance and testing data collected by the Ohio Department of Health or collected and reported by local health districts. Information can include location and dates of trapping/surveillance, vector species identified, and testing status for pathogens.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Summary electronic records (e.g., Excel database)- retain until superseded. Hardcopy/paper and Electronic documents- Retain for 2 years then destroy. ; Electronic: Summary electronic records (e.g., Excel database)- retain until superseded. Hardcopy/paper and Electronic documents- Retain for 2 years then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
